name: S10: Prediabetes Reversal — Escapers vs Progressors Baseline
description: Baseline covariate profile comparison between prediabetes escapers (no T2DM within 5 years) and progressors (T2DM within 5 years). Evaluates demographic, clinical, and pharmacological differences for the Prediabetes Reversal study.

design_json.description: Baseline characterization comparing demographic, clinical, and pharmacological profiles of prediabetes escapers vs progressors across demographics, conditions, drugs, measurements, procedures, and visits in the 365 days prior to index.
